/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libmy_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/my_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/my_msgs/msg/detail/bbox_msg__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib:/home/misys/robotics_lecture/BboxMessage/build/my_msgs: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libmy_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.24 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
